name: unsat_bad_transition
notes: Negative fixture, two faithful witnesses. (1) SMT: inputs.smt2 over-pins state_next=Count(4); problem+prev+inputs is UNSAT (the relation forces state_next=Count(2)). (2) Runtime: querying the fsm with state=Format(3) forces state_next=Count(2), which DIFFERS from the forbidden Count(4). The runtime can't reproduce the UNSAT by pinning state_next as a `given` — the functionizer fast-path treats given values as ground truth (it would echo Count(4) and report SAT) — so the runtime witness is forced-output-differs. given holds only the true inputs; expect.forbidden holds the impossible output.
